'''Jerga''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], while still young, Jerga was among those [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] at the [[Jedi Academy (Ossus)|Ossus Academy]] when the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] attempted to "secure" it, holding the students hostage. Jerga, unarmed, was able to resist a coma-gas attack on the part of GAG troopers, but when GAG [[Major/Legends|major]] [[Salle Serpa]] began torturing [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Tionne Solusar]] to provoke the Jedi into attack, Jerga stormed out from hiding to aid her, and was cut down by GAG snipers with multiple shots to the head.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'' {{1st}}
